title: 🎬 Seamless Full-Screen Workspace Fixes
message: We've optimized full-screen immersive view presentation controls across the studio editor and carousel decks while securing stability updates.
points: Unified Full-Screen Experience: Tap anywhere on the card canvas spaces to hide UI panels instantly and enjoy clean, clutter-free 3D card presentation displays.
Network Error Dialogue Protection: Introduced a smart network warning to alert users transparently when ad blockers or lack of internet block verification checks.
Visual Material Reference Fix: Resolved an asset rendering tracking bug where look and material finish changes would display wrong page details on multi-page cards.
State Transformation Settle Guard: Stabilized alignment layouts by introducing clean workspace transform resets when pages are deleted inside the active builder.
Legacy Save Database Support: Fully optimized deserialization pipelines to guarantee existing user databases update to the new system cleanly with zero file corruption.

title: 🌀 Introducing the 3D Cinematic Deck Viewer
message: We've added an entirely new way to experience, browse, and search through your 3D Card Vault with high-end fluid animations.
points: Cinematic Carousel Deck: A brand new interactive view mode that places your 3D documents center stage.
Dual Gutter Edge Gestures: Drag up and down along the screen edges to rotate through your files smoothly.
High-Speed Reactive Search: Locate specific documents instantly directly within the main gallery layout.
Data Sync Optimization: Completely decoupled build states to optimize card rendering framerates and lookups.
Multi-Page Failure Guard: Secured file indexing structures to avoid view locks on empty page transitions.

title: ✨ Introducing the Update Hub
message: We've added a dedicated space to keep your 3D Vault perfectly in sync with our latest innovations.
points: New Update Hub: Access interactive changelogs and version history.
Smart Notifications: Stay informed about important security and feature patches.
UI Refinement: Moved update controls to the navigation dock for a cleaner workspace.
System Stability: Optimized remote configuration fetching for faster app launches.
